mapper.insert: insert into kh_user_drug_interaction (user_id, user_drug_id1, user_drug_id2, drug_id1, drug_id2, drug_name1, drug_name2, severity_level, show_status) values (#{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{userDrugId1,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{userDrugId2,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{drugId1,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{drugId2,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{drugName1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{drugName2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{severityLevel,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, #{showStatus,jdbcType=SMALLINT})

insert into kh_user_drug_interaction (user_id, user_drug_id1, user_drug_id2, drug_id1, drug_id2, drug_name1, drug_name2, severity_level, show_status) values
(#{item.userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.userDrugId1,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.userDrugId2,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.drugId1,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.drugId2,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.drugName1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.drugName2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.severityLevel,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, #{item.showStatus,jdbcType=SMALLINT})
mapper.select: select user_id, user_drug_id1, user_drug_id2, drug_id1, drug_id2, drug_name1, drug_name2, severity_level, show_status, update_time from kh_user_drug_interaction where user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT} and show_status = 1
